title: Short title
doc_html:
PART VIII.  LICENSING OF PEDIATRIC DAY HEALTH CARE FACILITIES

§2193.  Short title

This Part may be cited as the "Pediatric Day Health Care Facility Licensing Law".

Acts 2004, No. 432, §1, eff. June 24, 2004.
